TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Macky_Sall, title = Macky_Sall, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Macky_Sall} }

S.FORM: I 1961 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 11 a romi'ad masofoc ci Macky Sall , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Senegal anini i ci Macky Sall, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 2 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ma ¶kj sa…æ…æ , ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u s…ôn…ô*a…æ anini i ¶i ma ¶kj sa…æ…æ, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: I 1961 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 11 a romi'ad masofoc ci Macky Sall , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Senegal anini i ci Macky Sall, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 2 a romi'ad.
